channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Curated geopolitical news headlines from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Reviews US Proposal as Deal Progress Reported
item.description: Iran confirmed reviewing a new US proposal amid reports Washington and Tehran are closing in on a memorandum to end the Gulf conflict, though difficult issues like nuclear program remain unresolved.

item.title: 🇺🇸 US Intelligence: Iran Conflict Motivated Trump Assassination Attempt
item.description: DHS identified the US-Israel war with Iran as potential motive for the man accused of attempting to assassinate President Trump at a White House reporters gala last month.

item.title: 🇿🇦 South African Markets Rally on Iran War De-escalation Hopes
item.description: South African stocks, bonds, and rand strengthened after Trump signaled possible peace deal with Iran, boosting risk appetite for emerging market assets.

item.title: ⛪ Pope Leo Marks First Year with Growing Global Profile
item.description: Pope Leo marks his first year leading the Catholic Church with higher public profile and outspoken stance on world affairs, drawing criticism from Trump over nuclear weapons position.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Trump Threatens Higher-Level Strikes If Iran Rejects Deal
item.description: President Trump threatened escalated military action against Iran if Tehran refuses peace terms, while saying direct talks remain too soon after reporting progress toward agreement.

item.title: 💰🛢️ Oil Prices Fall, Markets Rise on Reports of US-Iran Peace Deal Progress
item.description: Brent crude dropped to $97 a barrel while European stock markets rallied after reports that the US and Iran are close to a memorandum of understanding to end the war. The deal would declare an end to hostilities and start negotiations on reopening the strait.

item.title: 🇸🇦🇦🇪 Saudi Arabia and UAE Drift Toward Open Rivalry Over Oil Policy and Regional Influence
item.description: Competition between the Gulf powers has turned into tension over energy quotas, regional conflicts and differing visions for the Middle East, as the UAE leaves OPEC and Saudi Arabia asserts dominance.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇱 US Political Divide Deepens Over Israel Policy
item.description: Washington examines how support for Israel has become one of the most polarizing issues in American politics, with partisan battles intensifying over military aid and diplomatic support.

item.title: 🇬🇧 UK May Elections Could Trigger National Breakup, Analysts Warn
item.description: Local elections across Britain may deepen regional divides and accelerate calls for Scottish independence and Irish reunification, potentially fracturing the United Kingdom.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇯🇵 China Condemns Japan's First Overseas Missile Test Since WWII
item.description: Beijing criticizes Tokyo's deployment of forces overseas and firing of offensive missiles during joint exercises with US allies near the Philippines, calling it evidence of Japan's remilitarization agenda.

item.title: 🇻🇳🇮🇳 Vietnam and India Seek Closer Ties to Hedge Against Superpower Dependence
item.description: Vietnam and India are strengthening strategic partnerships to reduce reliance on any single major power amid growing US-China competition in the Indo-Pacific region.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇮🇷 Chinese Foreign Minister Meets Iranian Counterpart in Beijing
item.description: China's Wang Yi held talks with Iran's Araghchi in Beijing as Tehran seeks diplomatic support amid the conflict with the US and Israel.

item.title: 🇪🇺🇺🇦 Europe Must Prepare for US NATO Exit, Analysis Warns
item.description: European nations face urgent questions about defense spending and fiscal capacity if the US withdraws from NATO, requiring unprecedented budget adjustments.

item.title: 🇺🇦🇷🇴 Ukraine Builds 'Drone Wall' on Romanian Border to Stop Russian Attacks
item.description: Ukraine is constructing defensive infrastructure along its border with Romania, a NATO member, to prevent Russian drone incursions from sparking wider conflict.

item.title: 💰💵 US Dollar Remains Range-Bound as Strait of Hormuz Conflict Persists
item.description: The dollar held steady as markets assessed the impact of ongoing Strait of Hormuz disruptions on global trade and energy supplies.

item.title: 🇸🇾 Syria Dismantles Alleged Hezbollah-Linked Assassination Cells
item.description: Damascus authorities have disrupted cells allegedly connected to Hezbollah involved in targeted killings amid shifting regional dynamics.

item.title: 🇹🇷🇰🇪 Türkiye and Kenya Sign Defense Cooperation Agreement
item.description: Turkey and Kenya finalized a defense cooperation pact during a major defense expo in Istanbul, expanding Ankara's security partnerships in Africa.

item.title: 🇬🇷🚢 Freedom Flotilla Vessels Continue Gaza Mission Through Greek Waters
item.description: Activist ships seeking to break the Gaza blockade have entered Greek territorial waters as they continue their journey toward the Palestinian enclave.

item.title: 🇮🇷💬 Iran Evaluating US Proposal to End War, Foreign Ministry Says
item.description: Tehran confirmed it is reviewing a US proposal amid diplomatic efforts to de-escalate the conflict, with both sides reported to be nearing a framework agreement.

item.title: 🇯🇵🇵🇭 Japan Fires Missile in Joint Drill With US Allies Near South China Sea
item.description: Japan's Self-Defense Forces fired an anti-ship missile during exercises with US, Australian and Philippine forces in waters facing the South China Sea, marking a significant escalation of Japan's overseas military activities.

item.title: 🇬🇧🗳️ UK Labour Faces Crisis in Local Elections
item.description: Labour is bracing for significant losses in local elections that could signal deeper troubles for Prime Minister Keir Starmer's government.

item.title: 🇿🇦⚠️ South Africa Reports Two Hantavirus Cases Linked to Ship
item.description: Health officials identified two cases of human-to-human hantavirus transmission connected to a vessel, raising concerns about disease spread through maritime routes.

item.title: 🌍⚛️ Nuclear Agency Chief Visits Fukushima Water Release Site
item.description: The International Atomic Energy Agency director visited the Fukushima nuclear plant to review Japan's controversial water release operations.

item.title: 🇮🇷🇨🇳 Iranian and Chinese Foreign Ministers Hold Talks in Beijing
item.description: Iran's foreign minister met with China's top diplomat as Tehran seeks Beijing's support in navigating the conflict with Washington and exploring diplomatic solutions.

item.title: 🇪🇺⚔️ EU Defense Chief Warns of Russian Aggression Risk
item.description: Europe's top defense official cautioned about the need for greater military preparedness in light of ongoing Russian threats to European security.
